How can someone so disorganized teach Organizational behavior? He changes the team quiz material the day before the actual quiz, is super unclear about what he wants for the individual case project. Offers 0 help and directs you to the library like the lazy bum he is. Late for final by 30 minutes and wasted everyones time. DO NOT TAKE WITH RON.

The class is pretty easy as long as you study for the weekly team quizzes and do well on the individual assignment and group presentation. His midterm and final was fair, as long as you study the slides he gives you and skim through textbook, its a pretty easy A. Velin isnt that great though, he is a lazy and disorganized person.

Very fun and interesting teacher! Classes are always interactive and keeps you awake. Exams are very fair. However, the criteria for the individual assignment wasn't very clear, so that could be an area for improvement. As well, study for the weekly team quizzes and hope to get good team members!!

His teaching isn't a problem, however he is incredibly frustrating with his organization. Constantly changing the syllabus all the time and also at the last minute. Had to check the syllabus constantly for last minute changes.

Changes what the syllabus says will be on the team quizzes 10:30 the night before, more than once. Half an hour late to the Final, and didn't put up the outline for it until 12am the day of the final. He's a nice guy and pretty decent at communicating the material but majorly lacking in organization and preparation.
Not sure if you attended the same class. Made you work hard but fair in feedback and grade

Doesn't teach. always finishes the class half-1 hour before 2 hours is up. doesn't reply to emails. doesn't show up on midterm and final exams. very irresponsible.  he also requires us to read an additional boring book...
I thought Ginger had a great teaching method. I would attend lectures just to hear her stories. In order to ace this class memorize the text and you'll be set!
I really enjoyed this course. The material is mainly memorizing the textbook but Ginger made it as interesting as she could.
Don't know what's wrong with previous comments - I found her excellent! Helpful and great attitude towards students. But, I am getting good marks in the course!

What can I say, Ginger is very condescending to the students in this class. She literally treats everyone like a child, assumes everyone doesn't know anything and couldn't care less about her students. I know she's a great prof in upper level courses, but it'll be great if her attitude was the same. Oh and memorize the textbook!
Enjoyed the course - she does the best she can with this material. Mandatory bell curve can make it a nightmare so be prepared!
She did not seem interested in teaching, only the subject matter and listening to herself speak.

I was very interested in this course; at the end, it was not what I was expecting. We watched movies all semester. She just added 3 more chapters for final on last week of semester. I don't think she and TA teach anything. I personally didn't learn anything from her class except watching several movies. Don't take her class...Also she always late.
She's good because she relates the material, but in all honesty I found the lectures that weren't movies to be a little boring, and a tad repetitious,
Great prof

This was the hardest course I have taken so far in SFU.  Her exams were hard and lechures were boring.  I have nothing else to say except...don't take this course unless you really NEED it and don't expect it to be an easy ride because it would just end up slapping you in the face.
HE is not helpful,so bad

I feel that Phyllis is the most disorganized, boring and useless professor I have ever experienced. I did exceptionally well on all assignments, as reflected in my WEBCT percentage of 85%. I was sure I would get at LEAST a B. So, due to her teaching inabilities, my grade was bell-curved so far down as to reflect a C- for 85%, I was surprised!!!
Terrible control over class. Received a mid 80's grade but finished class with a C+. Worst class ever. Easy, but somehow detrimental to GPA. Doesn't make sense.
She will ruin your life!

Prof and TA's are super disorganized and lazy.  Our marks are never updated on webct (Dec 15th today and still havent been updated).  It's so fustrasting just thinking about this class.  Ignore at all costs.

A disorganized prof teaches organizational behaviour. Lectures are not helpful at all. The MT had MC and written questions. Final had 12 written questions. She's the worst prof I have ever had.I don't recommend her.

Awful prof, not helpful at all and her lectures are pretty much useless unless you want to sleep through it. Also very disorganized, even the TAs were confused about what was happening. I recommend avoiding this prof at all costs.

Unhelpful lectures & notes, but fair midterm. monotone puts people to sleep. final is all written questions, which will require u to utilize ur brain for memorizing all the definitions and theories. Doesn't know how to use a computer, wasted 15 minutes of class time to show a video clip which is totally not related to the course.
No Comments
Very soft-spoken so you are instantly put to sleep... Lectures are basically not very helpful... Just stick to reading the textbook...

If you want a high mark with minimal effort, take her courses.  If you want to learn, don't take her courses. She doesn't really seem that motivated to really teach the course as it should be taught. Depends what you want I guess.

Masood is awesome! the course is hard because of the content, but he tries very hard to teach us what we need to know (enough for the exams) there is no surprises with the exams, but you REALLY need to know the material well... the prob is that every gets a good mark, and after the bell curve, you can get a B with 80%! GET KAREN MAY FOR YOUR TA!!
